pages.text:
THE PRESIDENT

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WE, ZULFIKAR ALI BHUTTO, PRESIDENT OF THE ISLAMIC REPUBLIC

OF PAKISTAN

TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS MAY COME GREETINGS:

HAVING SEEN AND EXAMINED the CONVENTION DUE METRE establishing BUREAU INTERNATIONAL DES POIDS & MEASURES

Done at Paris May, 1875,

CONVENTION OF WHICH THE TEXT IS IN ENGLISH

DECLARE THAT WE ACCEDE TO IT AND PROMISE THAT IT WILL

BE INVIOLABLY OBSERVED.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, WE HAVE GIVEN THE PRESENTS, BEARING

THE SEAL OF THE ISLAMIC REPUBLIC OF PAKISTAN

Done at Rawalpindi this Fifleenth

day of

one thousand nine hundred and seventythree.

June in the year

polite his stumble (ZULFIKAR ALI BHUTTO)H. Pk.,

President of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan,
